title: TiKV crashes with overflow on BIGINT_MIN % -1 while TiFlash returns empty set
description: ## Bug Report ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ``` DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0; CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BIGINT); ALTER TABLE t0 SET TIFLASH REPLICA 1; INSERT INTO t0 VALUES (-9223372036854775808); SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t0]) */ true FROM t0 WHERE (t0.c0 %-1); SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t0]) */ true FROM t0 WHERE (t0.c0 %-1); ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) The same query returns the same results on both TiKV and TiFlash. ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ``` mysql> SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t0]) */ true FROM t0 WHERE (t0.c0 %-1); Empty set (0.21 sec) mysql> SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t0]) */ true FROM t0 WHERE (t0.c0 %-1); ERROR 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable ``` TiKV detail log ``` [2025/06/04 22:00:02.288 +08:00] [FATAL] [lib.rs:480] ["attempt to calculate the remainder with overflow"] SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tikv[t1]) */ c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE (c1 % -1) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT /*+ read_from_storage(tiflash[t1]) */ c1 FROM t1 WHERE (c1 % -1) = 0;
